# STRAT.049 ? Restorative Justice

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** conflict_resolution
**Domain:** CONFLICT_RESOLUTION
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Harm focus not rule-breaking; accountability; repair; stakeholder involvement; reintegration; healing; community

## Application
Identify harm; hold accountable; facilitate repair; include all affected; support reintegration; community healing; forward focus

## Key Values
- Harm repair
- Accountability
- Stakeholder inclusion
- Reintegration
- Community healing

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, conflict_resolution

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
